context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet cockatiel simulation
context.role: Popup menu with 3 care action buttons (feed, clean, pet)
context.usage_scenario: Appears when player taps screen, shows available care actions, disappears after selection or timeout

visual_specification.shape: 3 separate 8x8px icon buttons in horizontal row

animation.description: Two states per icon: active (full color) and disabled (gray). No animation, instant state changes.

visual_specification.details: Three 8x8px icons: Feed (seed shape #FFA300), Clean (broom shape #C2C3C7), Pet (hand shape #FFCCAA). Semi-transparent dark background (#1D2B53 at 80% opacity) behind icons. Icons turn gray (#5F574F) when on cooldown. Positioned at bottom right with 4px spacing between each.

relationships.shared_with: All UI elements share top layer rendering
relationships.differences_from: happiness_bar (popup vs always visible), speech_bubble (interactive vs informational)

explicit_negations: No animation on hover or press
No cooldown timer display (just gray state)
